title: Modern Jujutsu
description: A complete, client-side visual overhaul for the JujutsuCraft mod. Replaces the default HUD with a sleek, modern, and highly configurable interface, including a stunning cinematic for Domain Expansions.
body: **Tired of the default UI? Modern Jujutsu is a client-side addon that completely redesigns the HUD for the JujutsuCraft (Sorcery Fight) mod, giving it a sleek, modern, and stylish look.** **The highlight feature is a stunning, full-screen cinematic that plays every time you unleash a Domain Expansion!** Features **Complete Visual Overhaul: Replaces the old HUD with a clean, minimalist design.** **Cinematic Domain Expansion: A beautiful animation makes your ultimate move feel truly powerful.** **In-Game Configuration: Press the 'K' key (rebindable) to open a menu and toggle any part of the HUD you want.** **Client-Side Only: You can use this on any server that has JujutsuCraft, even if other players don't have this mod.** What It Replaces **Combat HUD: See your selected technique, CE cost, and a stylish CE bar.** **Movement HUD: Clean icons for Fly, Double Jump, and Backstep status.** **Six Eyes HUD: A compact analysis panel for your target's health, armor, and gear.** **Status Effects: A modern progress bar for actions like "Giving" CE.**
